title: lepidium meyenii var. gelidum
intro: Lepidium meyenii var. gelidum, also known as the gelidum Maca, is a perennial plant species in the Brassicaceae family, native to the Andean highlands. It is believed to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of bioactive compounds, including alkaloids, glycosides, and saponins, which are thought to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium meyenii var. gelidum are associated with its potential to improve fertility, energy, and overall well-being, as well as alleviate symptoms of menopause and stress. Herbal preparations of Lepidium meyenii var. gelidum include dried roots, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed as supplements or added to food and beverages.
